exam_delivery.notes: Computer exam is in Spanish. Paper English version available on request.

interpreter_notes: You may bring your own interpreter. Some offices also provide one if requested in advance.
practical_test_notes: Jalisco introduced a driving simulator test in 2025. This replaces the previous on-road driving test at most locations.

license_types.description: Standard driver's license for personal vehicles
Commercial license for cargo up to 3,500 kg and public service vehicles

costs.notes: Fees vary by license type and validity period. Check current rates at the Secretaría de Transporte.

required_documents: Official photo ID (INE/IFE, passport, or FM2/FM3 immigration document)
Proof of address (utility bill, bank statement — less than 3 months old)
CURP (Clave Única de Registro de Población) — foreigners can obtain this
Blood type certificate (from any lab or Red Cross)
